ayahs.textArabic: الٓرۚ تِلۡكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَقُرۡءَانٖ مُّبِينٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Aliflamra tilka ayatu alkitabi waquranin mubeenin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur'an.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Alif-Lãm-Ra. These are the verses of the Book; the clear Quran.

ayahs.textArabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَوۡ كَانُواْ مُسۡلِمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Rubama yawaddu allatheena kafaroo law kanoo muslimeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹The day will come when˺ the disbelievers will certainly wish they had submitted ˹to Allah˺.

ayahs.textArabic: ذَرۡهُمۡ يَأۡكُلُواْ وَيَتَمَتَّعُواْ وَيُلۡهِهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَلُۖ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Tharhum yakuloo wayatamattaAAoo wayulhihimu alamalu fasawfa yaAAlamoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹So˺ let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by ˹false˺ hope, for they will soon know.

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَآ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَرۡيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٞ مَّعۡلُومٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa walaha kitabun maAAloomun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We have never destroyed a society without a destined term.

ayahs.textArabic: مَّا تَسۡبِقُ مِنۡ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسۡتَـٔۡخِرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalaha wama yastakhiroona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: No people can advance their doom, nor can they delay it.

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَالُواْ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِي نُزِّلَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلذِّكۡرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجۡنُونٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqaloo ya ayyuha allathee nuzzila AAalayhi alththikru innaka lamajnoonun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They say, “O you to whom the Reminder is revealed! You must be insane!

ayahs.textArabic: لَّوۡمَا تَأۡتِينَا بِٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Law ma tateena bialmalaikati in kunta mina alssadiqeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Why do you not bring us the angels, if what you say is true?”

ayahs.textArabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ma nunazzilu almalaikata illa bialhaqqi wama kanoo ithan munthareena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and the disbelievers would not then be reprieved.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We do not send the angels down except for a just cause, and then ˹the end of˺ the disbelievers will not be delayed.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا ٱلذِّكۡرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna nahnu nazzalna alththikra wainna lahu lahafithoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, it is We who sent down the Qur'an and indeed, We will be its guardian.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: It is certainly We Who have revealed the Reminder, and it is certainly We Who will preserve it.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ فِي شِيَعِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad arsalna min qablika fee shiyaAAi alawwaleena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muhammad], among the sects of the former peoples.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, We sent messengers before you ˹O Prophet˺ among the groups of early peoples,

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَا يَأۡتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: but no messenger ever came to them without being mocked.

ayahs.textArabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسۡلُكُهُۥ فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Kathalika naslukuhu fee quloobi almujrimeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Thus do We insert denial into the hearts of the criminals.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: This is how We allow disbelief ˹to steep˺ into the hearts of the wicked.

ayahs.textArabic: لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ وَقَدۡ خَلَتۡ سُنَّةُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: La yuminoona bihi waqad khalat sunnatu alawwaleena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They would not believe in this ˹Quran˺ despite the ˹many˺ examples of those ˹destroyed˺ before.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَوۡ فَتَحۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم بَابٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّواْ فِيهِ يَعۡرُجُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaw fatahna AAalayhim baban mina alssamai fathalloo feehi yaAArujoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And even if We opened for them a gate to heaven, through which they continued to ascend,

ayahs.textArabic: لَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتۡ أَبۡصَٰرُنَا بَلۡ نَحۡنُ قَوۡمٞ مَّسۡحُورُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Laqaloo innama sukkirat absaruna bal nahnu qawmun mashooroona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: still they would say, “Our eyes have truly been dazzled! In fact, we must have been bewitched.”

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَعَلۡنَا فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجٗا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا لِلنَّٰظِرِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad jaAAalna fee alssamai buroojan wazayyannaha lilnnathireena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, We have placed constellations in the sky, and adorned it for all to see.

ayahs.textArabic: وَحَفِظۡنَٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيۡطَٰنٖ رَّجِيمٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wahafithnaha min kulli shaytanin rajeemin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allah]
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And We protected it from every accursed devil,

ayahs.textArabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسۡتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمۡعَ فَأَتۡبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٞ مُّبِينٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Illa mani istaraqa alssamAAa faatbaAAahu shihabun mubeenun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: except the one eavesdropping, who is then pursued by a visible flare.

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنَٰهَا وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ مَّوۡزُونٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli shayin mawzoonin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: As for the earth, We spread it out and placed upon it firm mountains, and caused everything to grow there in perfect balance.

ayahs.textArabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا لَكُمۡ فِيهَا مَعَٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسۡتُمۡ لَهُۥ بِرَٰزِقِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: WajaAAalna lakum feeha maAAayisha waman lastum lahu biraziqeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And We made in it means of sustenance for you and others, who you do not provide for.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِن مِّن شَيۡءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wain min shayin illa AAindana khazainuhu wama nunazziluhu illa biqadarin maAAloomin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known measure.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: There is not any means ˹of sustenance˺ whose reserves We do not hold, only bringing it forth in precise measure.

ayahs.textArabic: وَأَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلرِّيَٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ بِخَٰزِنِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waarsalna alrriyaha lawaqiha faanzalna mina alssamai maan faasqaynakumoohu wama antum lahu bikhazineena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We send fertilizing winds, and bring down rain from the sky for you to drink. It is not you who hold its reserves.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡوَٰرِثُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wainna lanahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wanahnu alwarithoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely it is We Who give life and cause death. And We are the ˹Eternal˺ Successor.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَقۡدِمِينَ مِنكُمۡ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَـٔۡخِرِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad AAalimna almustaqdimeena minkum walaqad AAalimna almustakhireena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We certainly know those who have gone before you and those who will come after ˹you˺.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wainna rabbaka huwa yahshuruhum innahu hakeemun AAaleemun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely your Lord ˹alone˺ will gather them together ˹for judgment˺. He is truly All-Wise, All-Knowing.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, We created man from sounding clay moulded from black mud.

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱلۡجَآنَّ خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن قَبۡلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waaljanna khalaqnahu min qablu min nari alssamoomi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: As for the jinn, We created them earlier from smokeless fire.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَٰلِقُۢ بَشَرٗا مِّن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [mention, O Muhammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Remember, O Prophet˺ when your Lord said to the angels, “I am going to create a human being from sounding clay moulded from black mud.

ayahs.textArabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُواْ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So when I have fashioned him and had a spirit of My Own ˹creation˺ breathed into him, fall down in prostration to him.”

ayahs.textArabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fasajada almalaikatu kulluhum ajmaAAoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So the angels prostrated all together—

ayahs.textArabic: إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Illa ibleesa aba an yakoona maAAa alssajideena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: but not Iblîs, who refused to prostrate with the others.

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبۡلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala ya ibleesu ma laka alla takoona maAAa alssajideena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Allah asked, “O Iblîs! What is the matter with you that you did not join others in prostration?”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ لَمۡ أَكُن لِّأَسۡجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala lam akun liasjuda libasharin khalaqtahu min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He replied, “It is not for me to prostrate to a human You created from sounding clay moulded from black mud.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala faokhruj minha fainnaka rajeemun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Allah commanded, “Then get out of Paradise, for you are truly cursed.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ ٱللَّعۡنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wainna AAalayka allaAAnata ila yawmi alddeeni
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And surely upon you is condemnation until the Day of Judgment.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرۡنِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Satan appealed, “My Lord! Then delay my end until the Day of their resurrection.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala fainnaka mina almunthareena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Allah said, “You will be delayed

ayahs.textArabic: إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡوَقۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡلُومِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ila yawmi alwaqti almaAAloomi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Until the Day of the time well-known."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: until the appointed Day.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغۡوَيۡتَنِي لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَأُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala rabbi bima aghwaytanee laozayyinanna lahum fee alardi walaoghwiyannahum ajmaAAeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Satan responded, “My Lord! For allowing me to stray I will surely tempt them on earth and mislead them all together,

ayahs.textArabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Illa AAibadaka minhumu almukhlaseena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: except Your chosen servants among them.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَيَّ مُسۡتَقِيمٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala hatha siratun AAalayya mustaqeemun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Allah said, “This is the Way, binding on Me:

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيۡسَ لَكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ سُلۡطَٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡغَاوِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna AAibadee laysa laka AAalayhim sultanun illa mani ittabaAAaka mina alghaweena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: you will certainly have no authority over My servants, except the deviant who follow you,

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوۡعِدُهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wainna jahannama lamawAAiduhum ajmaAAeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and surely Hell is their destined place, all together.

ayahs.textArabic: لَهَا سَبۡعَةُ أَبۡوَٰبٖ لِّكُلِّ بَابٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ جُزۡءٞ مَّقۡسُومٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Laha sabAAatu abwabin likulli babin minhum juzon maqsoomun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: It has seven gates, to each a group of them is designated.”

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّٰتٖ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin waAAuyoonin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the righteous will be amid Gardens and springs.

ayahs.textArabic: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Odkhulooha bisalamin amineena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹It will be said to them,˺ “Enter in peace and security.”

ayahs.textArabic: وَنَزَعۡنَا مَا فِي صُدُورِهِم مِّنۡ غِلٍّ إِخۡوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٖ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: WanazaAAna ma fee sudoorihim min ghillin ikhwanan AAala sururin mutaqabileena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We will remove whatever bitterness they had in their hearts. In a friendly manner, they will be on thrones, facing one another.

ayahs.textArabic: لَا يَمَسُّهُمۡ فِيهَا نَصَبٞ وَمَا هُم مِّنۡهَا بِمُخۡرَجِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: La yamassuhum feeha nasabun wama hum minha bimukhrajeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: No fatigue will touch them there, nor will they ever be asked to leave.

ayahs.textArabic: ۞ نَبِّئۡ عِبَادِيٓ أَنِّيٓ أَنَا ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Nabbi AAibadee annee ana alghafooru alrraheemu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Inform My servants ˹O Prophet˺ that I am truly the All-Forgiving, Most Merciful,

ayahs.textArabic: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِي هُوَ ٱلۡعَذَابُ ٱلۡأَلِيمُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wa anna AAathabee huwa alAAathabu alaleemu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and that My torment is indeed the most painful.

ayahs.textArabic: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ عَن ضَيۡفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wanabbihum AAan dayfi ibraheema
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And inform them about the guests of Abraham,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And inform them ˹O Prophet˺ about Abraham’s guests

ayahs.textArabic: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَٰمٗا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمۡ وَجِلُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala inna minkum wajiloona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who entered upon him and greeted ˹him with˺, “Peace!” He ˹later˺ said, “Surely we are afraid of you.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالُواْ لَا تَوۡجَلۡ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qaloo la tawjal inna nubashshiruka bighulamin AAaleemin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They reassured ˹him˺, “Do not be afraid! Surely we give you good news of a knowledgeable son.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِي عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala abashshartumoonee AAala an massaniya alkibaru fabima tubashshirooni
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He wondered, “Do you give me good news despite my old age? What unlikely news!”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالُواْ بَشَّرۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡقَٰنِطِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qaloo bashsharnaka bialhaqqi fala takun mina alqaniteena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They responded, “We give you good news in all truth, so do not be one of those who despair.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ وَمَن يَقۡنَطُ مِن رَّحۡمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala waman yaqnatu min rahmati rabbihi illa alddalloona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He exclaimed, “Who would despair of the mercy of their Lord except the misguided?”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala fama khatbukum ayyuha almursaloona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He ˹then˺ added, “What is your mission, O messenger-angels?”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ أُرۡسِلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمٖ مُّجۡرِمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They replied, “We have actually been sent to a wicked people.

ayahs.textArabic: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Illa ala lootin inna lamunajjoohum ajmaAAeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: As for the family of Lot, we will certainly deliver them all,

ayahs.textArabic: إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرۡنَآ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Illa imraatahu qaddarna innaha lamina alghabireena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: except his wife. We have determined that she will be one of the doomed.”

ayahs.textArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Falamma jaa ala lootin almursaloona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So when the messengers came to the family of Lot,

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ إِنَّكُمۡ قَوۡمٞ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala innakum qawmun munkaroona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: he said, “You are surely an unfamiliar people!”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالُواْ بَلۡ جِئۡنَٰكَ بِمَا كَانُواْ فِيهِ يَمۡتَرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qaloo bal jinaka bima kanoo feehi yamtaroona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They responded, “We have come to you with that ˹torment˺ which they have doubted.

ayahs.textArabic: وَأَتَيۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَٰدِقُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waataynaka bialhaqqi wainna lasadiqoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We come to you with the truth, and we are certainly truthful.

ayahs.textArabic: فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَٱتَّبِعۡ أَدۡبَٰرَهُمۡ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدٞ وَٱمۡضُواْ حَيۡثُ تُؤۡمَرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faasri biahlika biqitAAin mina allayli waittabiAA adbarahum wala yaltafit minkum ahadun waimdoo haythu tumaroona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So travel with your family in the dark of night, and follow ˹closely˺ behind them. Do not let any of you look back, and go where you are commanded.”

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَضَيۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡأَمۡرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقۡطُوعٞ مُّصۡبِحِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqadayna ilayhi thalika alamra anna dabira haolai maqtooAAun musbiheena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We revealed to him this decree: “Those ˹sinners˺ will be uprooted in the morning.”

ayahs.textArabic: وَجَآءَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wajaa ahlu almadeenati yastabshiroona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the people of the city came rejoicing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And there came the men of the city, rejoicing.

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيۡفِي فَلَا تَفۡضَحُونِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala inna haolai dayfee fala tafdahooni
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Lot pleaded, “Indeed, these are my guests, so do not embarrass me.

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخۡزُونِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waittaqoo Allaha wala tukhzooni
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Fear Allah and do not humiliate me.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالُوٓاْ أَوَلَمۡ نَنۡهَكَ عَنِ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qaloo awalam nanhaka AAani alAAalameena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They responded, “Have we not forbidden you from protecting anyone?”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِيٓ إِن كُنتُمۡ فَٰعِلِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala haolai banatee in kuntum faAAileena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He said, “O my people! Here are my daughters ˹so marry them˺ if you wish to do so.”

ayahs.textArabic: لَعَمۡرُكَ إِنَّهُمۡ لَفِي سَكۡرَتِهِمۡ يَعۡمَهُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: LaAAamruka innahum lafee sakratihim yaAAmahoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: By your life, [O Muhammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: By your life ˹O Prophet˺, they certainly wandered blindly, intoxicated ˹by lust˺.

ayahs.textArabic: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّيۡحَةُ مُشۡرِقِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu mushriqeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So the shriek seized them at sunrise.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So the ˹mighty˺ blast overtook them at sunrise.

ayahs.textArabic: فَجَعَلۡنَا عَٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةٗ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: FajaAAalna AAaliyaha safilaha waamtarna AAalayhim hijaratan min sijjeelin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And We turned the cities ˹of Sodom and Gomorrah˺ upside down and rained upon them stones of baked clay.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّلۡمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatin lilmutawassimeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely in this are signs for those who contemplate.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٖ مُّقِيمٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wainnaha labisabeelin muqeemin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, those cities are [situated] on an established road.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Their ruins still lie along a known route.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan lilmumineena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely in this is a sign for those who believe.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِن كَانَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ لَظَٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wain kana ashabu alaykati lathalimeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the companions of the thicket were [also] wrongdoers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And the residents of the Forest were truly wrongdoers,

ayahs.textArabic: فَٱنتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٖ مُّبِينٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faintaqamna minhum wainnahuma labiimamin mubeenin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: so We inflicted punishment upon them. The ruins of both nations still lie on a well-known road.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡحِجۡرِ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad kaththaba ashabu alhijri almursaleena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the residents of the Stone Valley also denied the messengers.

ayahs.textArabic: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمۡ ءَايَٰتِنَا فَكَانُواْ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waataynahum ayatina fakanoo AAanha muAArideena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We gave them Our signs, but they turned away from them.

ayahs.textArabic: وَكَانُواْ يَنۡحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wakanoo yanhitoona mina aljibali buyootan amineena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They carved their homes in the mountains, feeling secure.

ayahs.textArabic: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّيۡحَةُ مُصۡبِحِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu musbiheena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But the shriek seized them at early morning.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But the ˹mighty˺ blast overtook them in the morning,

ayahs.textArabic: فَمَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fama aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yaksiboona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and all they achieved was of no help to them.

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَأٓتِيَةٞۖ فَٱصۡفَحِ ٱلصَّفۡحَ ٱلۡجَمِيلَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma illa bialhaqqi wainna alssaAAata laatiyatun faisfahi alssafha aljameela
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We have not created the heavens and the earth and everything in between except for a purpose. And the Hour is certain to come, so forgive graciously.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلۡخَلَّٰقُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna rabbaka huwa alkhallaqu alAAaleemu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely your Lord is the Master Creator, All-Knowing.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَٰكَ سَبۡعٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمَثَانِي وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ ٱلۡعَظِيمَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad ataynaka sabAAan mina almathanee waalqurana alAAatheema
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have certainly given you, [O Muhammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur'an.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We have certainly granted you the seven often-repeated verses and the great Quran.

ayahs.textArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيۡنَيۡكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: La tamuddanna AAaynayka ila ma mattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum wala tahzan AAalayhim waikhfid janahaka lilmumineena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Do not let your eyes crave the ˹fleeting˺ pleasures We have provided for some of the disbelievers, nor grieve for them. And be gracious to the believers.

ayahs.textArabic: وَقُلۡ إِنِّيٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqul innee ana alnnatheeru almubeenu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner" -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And say, “I am truly sent with a clear warning”—

ayahs.textArabic: كَمَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَى ٱلۡمُقۡتَسِمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Kama anzalna AAala almuqtasimeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹a warning˺ similar to what We sent to those who divided ˹the Scriptures˺,

ayahs.textArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُواْ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ عِضِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Allatheena jaAAaloo alqurana AAideena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Who have made the Qur'an into portions.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who ˹now˺ accept parts of the Quran, rejecting others.

ayahs.textArabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسۡـَٔلَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fawarabbika lanasalannahum ajmaAAeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So by your Lord! We will certainly question them all

ayahs.textArabic: عَمَّا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: AAamma kanoo yaAAmaloona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: About what they used to do.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: about what they used to do.

ayahs.textArabic: فَٱصۡدَعۡ بِمَا تُؤۡمَرُ وَأَعۡرِضۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: FaisdaAA bima tumaru waaAArid AAani almushrikeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So proclaim what you have been commanded, and turn away from the polytheists.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّا كَفَيۡنَٰكَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَهۡزِءِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna kafaynaka almustahzieena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely We will be sufficient for you against the mockers,

ayahs.textArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجۡعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَۚ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Allatheena yajAAaloona maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fasawfa yaAAlamoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who set up ˹other˺ gods with Allah. They will soon come to know.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ نَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدۡرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad naAAlamu annaka yadeequ sadruka bima yaqooloona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We certainly know that your heart is truly distressed by what they say.

ayahs.textArabic: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika wakun mina alssajideena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So glorify the praises of your Lord and be one of those who ˹always˺ pray,

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱعۡبُدۡ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأۡتِيَكَ ٱلۡيَقِينُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: WaoAAbud rabbaka hatta yatiyaka alyaqeenu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death).
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and worship your Lord until the inevitable comes to you.
